sourceMovie.title: Thelma
sourceMovie.whyPeopleLoveIt: Audiences latched onto Thelma (2024) as a action theatrical experience: big enough for a group watch, specific enough to reward a second viewing once you know where it's headed. The action and comedy blend is the engine: it lets the film shift registers without feeling like two different movies stitched together.

recommendations.title: Charlie's Angels
recommendations.whyYoullLoveIt: If Thelma clicked for you, Charlie's Angels (2019) is a strong next stop: both trade in action and comedy, with comic timing and sharper banter. Expect a different story, but a similar willingness to go big when the moment demands it.

recommendations.title: Pirates of the Caribbean: The Curse of the Black Pearl
recommendations.whyYoullLoveIt: If Thelma clicked for you, Pirates of the Caribbean: The Curse of the Black Pearl (2003) is a strong next stop: both trade in action and adventure, with momentum and clean stakes. Expect a different story, but a similar willingness to go big when the moment demands it.

faq.question: What should I watch after Thelma?
faq.answer: Try Charlie's Angels, Pirates of the Caribbean: The Curse of the Black Pearl, Bumblebee—each shares DNA with Thelma while changing the setting enough to feel fresh.

faq.question: What genre is Thelma?
faq.answer: Thelma (2024) is best described as Action, Comedy, Adventure. Stores and algorithms use different labels, but that mix is what fans actually recognize on a rewatch.

faq.question: Is Thelma worth revisiting?
faq.answer: Viewer scores sit around 6.8/10 on TMDB—high enough that replays are common for people who like this action lane.
